sentences.arabic: تَنْصَحُ الدِّرَاسَاتُ بِتَقْلِيلِ سَاعَاتِ اسْتِخْدَامِ الْهَاتِفِ الذَّكِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Studije preporučuju smanjenje sati korištenja pametnog telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Studies recommend reducing the hours of smartphone use.

sentences.arabic: الْجُلُوسُ الطَّوِيلُ أَمَامَ الشَّاشَةِ يُؤَثِّرُ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Dugo sjedenje ispred ekrana utječe na zdravlje očiju.
sentences.translationEn: Sitting for a long time in front of the screen affects eye health.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْأَفْضَلِ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْبَقَاءِ عَلَى الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Bolje je baviti se sportom umjesto ostajanja na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: It is better to practice sports instead of staying on the internet.
